# Database tree (`@afenda/database`)

**Maintenance:** Do not edit this file without explicit maintainer approval.

**Allowlist (strict):** The authoritative **list of paths that may exist** under `src/schema/` is **this document** (§1 tree below). Edit **008** in the same PR as any add/remove/rename under `src/schema/`. The **logical** foundation (namespaces, table families) is [002-foundation-inventory.md](./002-foundation-inventory.md). The **full knowledge base** (L1/L2/L3 truth layers, relations, queries, raw SQL, Kit config) is [002A-foundation-inventory-architecture.md](./002A-foundation-inventory-architecture.md).

Registered modules are those under `packages/_database/src/schema/` re-exported from `src/schema/index.ts` (which re-exports `shared/`, including `shared-sql-defaults.ts`) and covered by `DRIZZLE_MANAGED_PG_SCHEMAS` (`iam`, `mdm`, `ref`, `finance`, `governance`). Each `*.schema.ts` line below is marked **— authorised**; `shared-sql-defaults.ts` is authorised shared SQL fragments (not a `*.schema.ts` table module—see file header).

### Path freeze (reconcile with `practical-discipline.md`)

These **non-DDL** support folders live **only** under **`src/schema/<name>/`** on disk:

`identity/` · `tenancy/` · `pkg-governance/` · `environment-support/` · `constants/`

**7W1H audit** (DDL for `governance.audit_logs`, enums, Zod boundary, action catalog, insert/query services) lives at **`packages/_database/src/7w1h-audit/`** — a **sibling** of `src/schema/` (`@afenda/database/7w1h-audit`). Files are re-exported from **`src/schema/governance/index.ts`** so Drizzle Kit still sees them in the schema graph.

There is **no** `src/schema/audit/` tree; **`audit_logs.schema.ts` is not authored under `schema/governance/`** anymore (it lives in `7w1h-audit/`).

---

## 1. Registered Drizzle schema tree (`src/schema/`)

Mirror of on-disk layout; keep in sync with [002A §4](./002A-foundation-inventory-architecture.md#4-complete-srcschema-tree-files-on-disk).

```
packages/_database/
  src/
    schema/
      index.ts

      shared/
        columns.schema.ts                                    — authorised
        enums.schema.ts                                      — authorised
        shared-sql-defaults.ts                               — authorised (shared `sql` fragments)
        shared-boundary.schema.ts                            — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          shared-boundary.test.ts                          — authorised

      ref/
        _schema.ts                                           — authorised (pgSchema("ref") handle)
        countries.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        currencies.schema.ts                                 — authorised
        locales.schema.ts                                    — authorised
        timezones.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        uoms.schema.ts                                       — authorised
        ref-boundary.schema.ts                               — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          ref-boundary.schemas.test.ts                       — authorised

      mdm/
        _schema.ts                                           — authorised (pgSchema("mdm") handle)
        addresses.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        business-units.schema.ts                             — authorised
        customers.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        custom-field-definitions.schema.ts                   — authorised
        custom-field-values.schema.ts                        — authorised
        document-sequences.schema.ts                         — authorised
        external-identities.schema.ts                        — authorised
        item-categories.schema.ts                            — authorised
        item-entity-settings.schema.ts                       — authorised
        items.schema.ts                                      — authorised
        legal-entities.schema.ts                             — authorised
        locations.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        master-aliases.schema.ts                             — authorised
        mdm-boundary.schema.ts                               — authorised
        org-units.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        parties.schema.ts                                    — authorised
        party-addresses.schema.ts                            — authorised
        suppliers.schema.ts                                  — authorised
        tax-registrations.schema.ts                          — authorised
        tenant-label-overrides.schema.ts                     — authorised
        tenant-policies.schema.ts                            — authorised
        tenant-profiles.schema.ts                            — authorised
        tenants.schema.ts                                    — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          mdm-boundary.test.ts                               — authorised

      iam/
        _schema.ts                                           — authorised (pgSchema("iam") handle)
        authority-policies.schema.ts                         — authorised
        auth-challenges.schema.ts                            — authorised
        identity-links.schema.ts                             — authorised
        iam-boundary.schema.ts                               — authorised
        persons.schema.ts                                    — authorised
        tenant-memberships.schema.ts                         — authorised
        tenant-role-assignments.schema.ts                    — authorised
        tenant-roles.schema.ts                               — authorised
        user-accounts.schema.ts                              — authorised
        user-identities.schema.ts                            — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          iam-boundary.test.ts                               — authorised

      finance/
        _schema.ts                                           — authorised (pgSchema("finance") handle)
        accounts.schema.ts                                   — authorised
        chart-of-account-sets.schema.ts                      — authorised
        fiscal-calendars.schema.ts                           — authorised
        fiscal-periods.schema.ts                             — authorised
        finance-boundary.schema.ts                           — authorised
        legal-entity-coa-assignments.schema.ts               — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          finance-boundary.schemas.test.ts                   — authorised

      governance/
        _schema.ts                                           — authorised (pgSchema("governance") handle)
governance-data-sources.schema.ts                    — authorised
        governance-boundary.schema.ts                        — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          governance-boundary.schemas.test.ts                — authorised

      identity/
        index.ts
        services/
          ensure-identity-link-for-better-auth-user.ts       — authorised

      tenancy/
        index.ts
        tenancy-boundary.schema.ts                           — authorised
        services/
          assert-user-has-tenant-access.ts                   — authorised
          resolve-active-tenant-context.ts                     — authorised
          resolve-afenda-me-context.ts                       — authorised
        __tests__/
          tenancy-boundary.test.ts                           — authorised

      pkg-governance/
        constants.ts                                         — authorised
        database-concepts.ts                                 — authorised
        migration-sql-files.ts                               — authorised
        pkg-governance-boundary.schema.ts                    — authorised
        schema-modules.ts                                    — authorised
        sql-identifiers.ts                                   — authorised
        index.ts
        __tests__/
          governance.test.ts                                 — authorised

      environment-support/
        environment-integer-parsing.ts                       — authorised
        environment-integer.schema.ts                        — authorised
        index.ts

      constants/
        runtime.ts                                           — authorised
```

**7W1H audit** (`src/7w1h-audit/`, re-exported by `schema/governance/index.ts`):

```
packages/_database/src/7w1h-audit/
  audit-enums.schema.ts                                    — authorised (pgEnum, governance DDL)
  audit-logs.schema.ts                                     — authorised
  seven-w1h-audit-boundary.schema.ts                       — authorised (Zod; not Drizzle DDL)
  index.ts
  contracts/
  services/
  __tests__/
```

---

## 2. `*.schema.ts` outside the registered schema barrel

These files use the `*.schema.ts` suffix but live **outside** `src/schema/` (not table/enum modules in the Drizzle `schema` entrypoint). Use this list to **justify**: relocate into `src/schema/` if they become real DDL, **rename** if the suffix should be reserved for Drizzle-only (see `pkg-governance/schema-modules.ts`), or **remove** if obsolete.

```
packages/_database/
  src/
    relations/
      relations.schema.ts
        → Drizzle `relations()` re-exports only; no `pgTable`. Keep near domain relations or rename
          (e.g. relations.bundle.ts) if `.schema.ts` must mean DDL-only.

    studio/
      business-glossary.schema.ts
        → Zod document shapes for glossary snapshots; not Drizzle. Candidate rename to `*.zod.ts` or
          `business-glossary.doc.ts` to avoid confusion with Drizzle schema modules.

      studio-enums.schema.ts
        → Studio / snapshot enum metadata; not `pgEnum` DDL. Align naming with governance rules or fold
          into a single studio manifest module.

      studio-snapshot-metadata.schema.ts
        → Zod envelope for studio snapshots. Same naming concern as `business-glossary.schema.ts`.

      truth-governance.schema.ts
        → Zod truth-governance snapshot types. Same naming concern as above.
```

**Summary**

| Path                            | Kind                     | Typical action                                       |
| ------------------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `relations/relations.schema.ts` | Drizzle relations barrel | Keep or rename if DDL suffix is reserved             |
| `studio/*.schema.ts`            | Zod / studio metadata    | Rename suffix or merge; do not treat as Postgres DDL |

---

## 3. Other top-level folders under `src/` (not under `src/schema/`)

These exist beside `schema/` and `relations/`; they are **not** extra PostgreSQL schema roots.

```text
packages/_database/src/
  client.ts
  index.ts
  7w1h-audit/               # 7W1H audit (DDL + services; see §1 governance re-exports)
  schema/                   # all DDL + schema barrels (see §1–§2)
  relations/                # Drizzle relations() only
  queries/                  # canonical resolvers
  studio/                   # glossary / snapshots (not DDL)
  migrations/               # `index.ts` — migration layout anchor; generated SQL is `packages/_database/drizzle/`
  views/                    # Drizzle pgView read models (re-exported via schema barrel)
  __tests__/
```

---

## 4. Gap vs [001](./001-postgreSQL-DDL.md) — Layer 5 governance masters (not yet on disk)

The **registered** `governance/` DDL today is `audit-enums`, `audit-logs`, `data-sources` (see §1). **[001](./001-postgreSQL-DDL.md)** Layer 5 also calls for additional MDM governance surfaces (survivorship, golden record, match/merge, data quality). They are **not** in the tree yet; when added, place them here:

```text
packages/_database/src/schema/governance/
  survivorship-rules.schema.ts
  master-records.schema.ts
  master-record-matches.schema.ts
  master-record-merges.schema.ts
  data-quality-issues.schema.ts
```

Re-export via `governance/index.ts` and `src/schema/index.ts`. Same gap is described in [`practical-discipline.md`](../practical-discipline.md) §4.
